mapper.select: SELECT id, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, order_item_id, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, apply_quantity, approved_quantity, refundable_amount, apply_amount, approved_amount, exchange_sku_id, item_status, created_at, updated_at FROM after_sales_item WHERE after_sales_id = #{afterSalesId}

SELECT id, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, order_item_id, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, apply_quantity, approved_quantity, refundable_amount, apply_amount, approved_amount, exchange_sku_id, item_status, created_at, updated_at FROM after_sales_item WHERE after_sales_no = #{afterSalesNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO after_sales_item ( after_sales_id, after_sales_no, order_item_id, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, apply_quantity, approved_quantity, refundable_amount, apply_amount, approved_amount, exchange_sku_id, item_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{afterSalesId}, #{afterSalesNo}, #{orderItemId}, #{productId}, #{skuId}, #{productName}, #{skuName}, #{applyQuantity}, #{approvedQuantity}, #{refundableAmount}, #{applyAmount}, #{approvedAmount}, #{exchangeSkuId}, #{itemStatus}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE after_sales_item SET approved_quantity = #{approvedQuantity}, approved_amount = #{approvedAmount}, item_status = #{itemStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
